case_title: ISSAM KOUKOUH EL MZOURI VS. MICHELE SALLEY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,700.00 FILED BY EL MZOURI, ISSAM KOUKOUH AS TO DEFENDANT SALLEY, MICHELE SALLEY, TAYLOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EL MZOURI, ISSAM KOUKOUH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SALLEY, MICHELE SALLEY, TAYLOR PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT OR COSTS AS DEFENDANT HAS BEEN READY, WILLING AND ABLE TO REFUND TO PLAINTIFF THE BALANCE OF HIS SECURITY DEPOSIT, $1,617.00 AND HAS MADE SUCH OFFER AFTER A DEDUCTION FOR NECESSARY CLEANING ($283.00). PLAINTIFF HAS REFUSED TO ACCEPT THE REFUND. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ISSAM KOUKOUH EL MZOURI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS MICHELLE SALLEY AND TAYLOR SALLEY ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $58.00 SERVED APR-13-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SALLEY, TAYLOR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $58.00 SERVED APR-13-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SALLEY, MICHELE
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO MICHELLE SALLEY ON 5/12/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "FOWARD TIME EXPIRED-RETURN TO SENDER."
